entry.title: VS Code Server installation guide
entry.summary:
Purpose of this guide is to provide a step-by-step installation process for Visual Studio Code server on Linux systems. This guide will help you set up VS Code server for remote development in web interface.
Installation Via GitHub releases
Go to temp directory and create a directory named code-server.
cd /tmp mkdir code-server cd code-server
Download compatible binaries of code s...

entry.title: Install docker on Ubuntu Server
entry.summary:
Installation
Update apt package
sudo apt update sudo apt install -y ca-certificates curl
Add Docker’s official GPG key:
sudo install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings sudo curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc sudo chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
Add the repository to Apt sources:
echo \ "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architec...
